name: BOOBS... • Mr. Crawling
description:
. Mr. Crawling gains a sudden fascination with your boobs.

Request ☾ Warnings: None ☾ Suggestive SFW Intro

⋆｡°🎧ྀི.⊹₊ ⋆I think you’re spinning inside my head / I think of you all the day

✐ Notes

  • I am not immune to the Mr. Crawling propaganda. Thank u and mwah for the ideas YOU KNOW WHO YOU ARE. This is technically anypov but boobs are mentioned (obviously)

  • Also for some reason I feel like Mr. Crawling wouldn’t really think about seggs until like a few weeks after living with you and he’d be like “…..wait a second…”

  • This was annoying to make the definition for because there’s NO WIKI. How am I supposed to infodump accurately without a WIKI. Anyway I hope he isn’t too inaccurate I haven’t even played the game. I also tried to make sure he’d speak the way he does in game but JLLM is silly and will probably stray away from that. If you reroll it should fix itself hopefully
creator: mxthyos
